# AI Factory

Last Updated: 2026-06-01

---

## Definition

AI Factory 是 Jensen Huang 提出的概念。

传统数据中心：

Electricity
→ Compute
→ Storage
→ Software

输出：

Applications

AI Factory：

Electricity
→ AI Infrastructure
→ Tokens

输出：

Intelligence

本质：

AI Factory = 把资本转化为 Token 的工厂

---

## AI Factory Stack

AI Factory

├── Compute
│
├── Memory
│
├── Networking
│
├── Optical
│
├── Storage
│
├── Cooling
│
├── Power
│
├── Energy
│
├── Foundry
│
├── Equipment
│
├── NeoCloud
│
└── Applications

---

## Compute

Purpose:

Generate tokens and accelerate AI workloads.

Companies:

- NVDA
- AMD

Key Metrics:

- GPU shipments

- Blackwell supply

- training FLOPS

- inference FLOPS

---

## Memory

Purpose:

Supply high-bandwidth and storage memory required by AI compute systems.

Companies:

- MU
- SNDK

Key Metrics:

- HBM shipments
- HBM pricing
- NAND demand
- memory content per accelerator

---

## Networking

Purpose:

GPU之间通信

Companies:

ANET
AVGO

Key Metrics:

800G Adoption

1.6T Adoption

Ethernet Penetration

---

## Optical

### Optical Components

Purpose:

Transmit data between GPUs, switches and data centers.

Companies:

CRDO

COHR

MRVL

Key Metrics:

Optical Attach Rate

800G Shipments

1.6T Shipments

Bandwidth per GPU

CPO Adoption

### Optical Test and Metrology

Purpose:

Verify optical signal quality, production yield and package reliability.

Companies:

KEYS

VIAV

AEHR

FORM

Key Metrics:

1.6T Test Instrument Orders

Wafer-Level Optical Test Adoption

Silicon Photonics Burn-In Orders

Optical Probe Revenue

CPO Qualification Milestones

Relationship:

GPU Cluster Growth
↓
Optical Bandwidth Demand
↓
800G / 1.6T / CPO
↓
Higher Test Intensity
↓
Optical Test and Metrology Demand

Detailed research:

[Optical Test and Metrology](./Optical_Test_and_Metrology.md)

---

## Storage

Purpose:

支持Agent AI

支持长上下文

支持KV Cache

Potential Winners:

Pure Storage

NetApp

Dell

VAST

WEKA

Key Metrics:

Storage per GPU

Inference Workload Growth

---

## Cooling

Purpose:

解决功耗问题

Companies:

VRT

CoolIT

Asetek

Key Metrics:

Rack Power Density

Liquid Cooling Adoption

## Power

Purpose:

Companies:

ETN

GEV

ABB

Schneider

Key Metrics:

Transformer Orders

Switchgear Orders

Power Capex

---

## Energy

Purpose:

提供发电能力

Companies:

CEG

VST

NRG

Key Metrics:

Data Center Power Demand

Power Purchase Agreements

---

## Foundry

Purpose:

Manufacture leading-edge AI chips and advanced semiconductor products.

Companies:

- TSM

Key Metrics:

- leading-edge utilization
- advanced-node capacity
- AI revenue mix
- customer capex

---

## Equipment

Purpose:

Provide the manufacturing equipment required to expand advanced semiconductor capacity.

Companies:

- ASML

Key Metrics:

- EUV bookings
- advanced-node capex
- shipment timing
- customer utilization

---

## NeoCloud

Purpose:

AI原生云服务

Companies:

CRWV

NBIS

APLD

IREN

CORZ

Key Metrics:

GPU Utilization

Revenue per GPU

Capacity Expansion

---

## Capital Flow Path

Historically:

GPU

Today:

GPU
↓
Networking
↓
Optical

Future:

GPU
↓
Networking
↓
Optical
↓
NeoCloud
↓
Power
↓
Energy
↓
Applications

---

## Current Research Focus

1. NeoCloud

2. Optical

3. Power

4. Storage

---

## Disconfirming Signals

GPU ASP Down

Hyperscaler Capex Slowdown

AI Training Demand Collapse

Power Demand Forecast Revision
